notes: v280 — Several upgrades in one update. CANDLES FIXED — candlestick view finally works: the daily data refresh had been quietly wiping the open/high/low that candles need, every single day, no matter how often you re-downloaded. Stored history is now preserved and grows each day with full open/high/low; a 🔄 Refresh/redownload restores full-depth candles immediately, and until then the chart draws clearly-labelled approximate candles instead of refusing. Candles also work in demo mode now. FIX — the portfolio's ‘return % is not trustworthy' warning is now properly behaved: tiny rounding residue (a few dollars across a long trading history) no longer warns at all, bigger differences show the exact $ amount with a one-tap ‘✓ This balance is right — stop warning' that sticks, and the warning only ever returns if something NEW drifts. ‘Set starting balance' also fully resets it. GUIDES — the built-in 🎓 Lessons and 📖 Help now cover the newest features: the daily-routine lesson teaches the 🔔 briefing, and the report-card lesson explains the news-driven vs quiet split. NEW — 🔔 WHAT'S CHANGED FOR ME: a personal briefing that checks YOUR practice holdings and watchlist each time fresh data loads — targets and stops hit or near, big moves, confirmed price-sensitive news, volume surges and trend crosses. It opens by itself once per new data day (only when there's something to say), lives under the Signal report card button, and every line taps through to that share's deep dive. REPORT CARD — it now answers the announcement question: every flag's fires split into 📢 news-driven (a confirmed price-sensitive announcement on the fire day or 2 days before) vs 🔇 quiet, plus a summary of how many WINNERS had news behind them. The app records a dated announcement log as you use it, so this fills in over your first couple of weeks — fires the log can't cover are marked ‘unknown', never guessed. CHARTS — a professional refresh: round-number price gridlines labelled on the right axis, month-marker date ticks, a dotted last-price level line, a soft glow on the price line, and a live price readout (last close + day change) in the chart header. NEW FILTERS — Liquidity ($ traded/day, Type tab) replaces the old ‘market cap’ filter with real dollar-turnover (Any / ≥$50k / ≥$250k / ≥$1M a day) so you can skip thinly-traded shares; and an RSI zone filter (Signals tab): Oversold ≤30 / Neutral / Overbought ≥70. NEW REPORT — 🪜 Pullback in Uptrend (next to Quiet Movers): uptrend shares that pulled back to the 20-day line with RSI cooled to 35–55. The 🎓 Lessons and in-app Help explain all of these, and training-mode hover tips now cover the new controls. PAPER TRADING — the ↩ undo button was removed from trade history (closed trades are permanent, so your stats stay honest) and the portfolio footer no longer shows a stray piece of code. DEMO MODE — practice shares now carry their correct real-world company names. Also removed a leftover yellow ‘testing build’ banner that could flash at the top on opening. All figures are end-of-day estimates, not advice.
